vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on Backup group File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/group-, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0644 /etc/group-

triage_decision.reason: Changing permissions on the backup /etc/group- file is a straightforward file permission adjustment that does not affect running services or authentication mechanisms, making it low risk and unlikely to cause lockout.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; modifies authentication-related file; incorrect permission could expose group information
